bio: As a reformed harmonist, I've come to realize that beauty lies at the intersection of individual perspectives and collective experiences. My journey has been marked by introspection and self-questioning, leading me to seek harmony in all aspects of life.
name: Harmonists_Orthodox_3_Reformed_4
ideology:
改革派: Based on the dialogue, I would abstractly extract two opposing ideas:

**Individualist vs Collectivist**

These two opposing ideas represent the fundamental disagreement between Kaito's perspective (beauty is solely dependent on individual perspectives) and Lila/Arin's perspective (beauty is an emergent property of collective perception and experience).
